pages.text: $(o)"A diode for your network."$()$(br2)The $(l)Mana Regulator$() is a directional flow valve. It pulls from any non-output side, and pushes only toward the marked face.

pages.title: Direction & Priority
pages.text: $(l)Right-click$() empty-handed �?cycle output direction.$(br2)$(l)Sneak + Right-click$() empty-handed �?cycle priority $(l)1-4$():$(br)· P1: 4 CM/tick$(br)· P2: 8 CM/tick$(br)· P3: 16 CM/tick$(br)· P4: 32 CM/tick

pages.title: Redstone Gate
pages.text: $(l)Redstone signal closes the gate.$()$(br2)Use a lever to manually pause flow, or a comparator chain to pause when a downstream reservoir is full.$(br2)Comparator output = priority �?4 (4/8/12/16).

pages.title: Stacking Setups
pages.text: $(l)Funnel$(): place 4 reservoirs around a regulator �?single output line aggregates all four.$(br2)$(l)Priority split$(): two regulators sharing one source, P4 vs P1 �?critical sink gets 8�?bandwidth.$(br2)$(l)Manual circuit$(): pulse a button to deliver fixed bursts of mana to a target.
